arts.ttl: SC Heerenveen v RKC Waalwijk Preview | Can Eredivisie bottom side grab second win of the season against Robin van Persie and co?
arts.sum: RKC Waalwijk have only won one game all season. The side are rooted to the bottom of the Eredivisie table with just five points from 13 games. They travel to…

Heerenveen are currently in 12th place in the Eredivisie standings, having earned 14 points from 13 matches. Their latest match ended in a disappointing 3-0 defeat to Feyenoord. In contrast, RKC Waal...
